markdown:
[ Registration ](/)

## Registration

This competition is open for everyone of all levels, everyone is welcome to participate in this competition. A team can consist of multiple teammates. Teams with only one person are also allowed. Teams that take part in the in-person competition need to provide and build an Roboracer car by themselves. To register in the 5th Roboracer Sim Racing League, please refer to the [ Sim Racing Registration page ](https://autodrive-ecosystem.github.io/competitions/roboracer-sim-racing-icra-2026/#registration).   


[Register Your Team](https://selapp.lanthan.at/?selection=icra2026)

  
  


If you have any question regarding your participation, please contact us at [roboracer2026icra@tuwien.ac.at](mailto:roboracer2026icra@tuwien.ac.at).

* * *

### Accomodation

Registration of accommodation needs to be organized and paid for individually by the participants. However, we are listing here a selection of options that you might consider interesting. Disclosure: The organizers are not affiliated with any of these accommodations and do not get any benefits from them. 

  * **Vienna Brigittenau - Youth Hostel**  
Webpage: <https://www.oejhv.at/en/youth-hostels/vienna/1200-vienna/>  
Address: Adalbert Stifter Straße 73, A-1200 Wien, AUSTRIA  
Public transport connections: Direct bus connection (line 11A) between the hostel and the conference location, which takes approximately 25 minutes.  
Breakfast included  
Booking happens per team directly with the hostel. For room rates, please check the webpage. 
  * Potentially further suggestions to come. 
  * **Official ICRA Conference Hotels**  
Webpage: <https://2026.ieee-icra.org/attend/housing-information/>  
Depending on your available budget, you might also consider the official ICRA conference hotels. 



* * *

### Participants

Note: Only teams that submitted all the required materials are listed below. This table is updated manually, for an automatically updated table see [this page](registration_auto_table.html). 

If you have registered for participation but the list below is not updated, please contact us at [roboracer2026icra@tuwien.ac.at](mailto:roboracer2026icra@tuwien.ac.at).   
Register the modified information under the same team name, and we will update it accordingly.

---|---|---
